infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Movietastic needs camera access to capture objects for your short movies.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Movietastic needs photo library access to save your movies.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Movietastic needs microphone access to record voice overs for your movies.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Movietastic to access your camera to capture objects for movies.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Movietastic to save your movies to your photo library.
